did.description: Pre-existing atproto DID, being imported to a new account.

plcOp.description: A signed DID PLC operation to be submitted as part of importing an existing account to this instance. NOTE: this optional field may be updated when full account migration is implemented.

password.description: Initial account password. May need to meet instance-specific password strength requirements.

recoveryKey.description: DID PLC rotation key (aka, recovery key) to be included in PLC creation operation.

did.description: The DID of the new account.

schema.description: Account login session returned on successful account creation.

main.description: Create an account. Implemented by PDS.
